name: DJ Sannergata / DJ  Saraland AMBIENT Chill out --> Elektro  ( med uteservering )
description:
OSLO FILMAKERS SOMMER HANGOUT! 
It’s a Friday, but you’ve already got the next day off 🙌🏻💯

🤘🏻 EVERYONE IS INVITED, regardless of you are experienced or beginner. – Directors, Cinematographers, Editors, Producers, Writers, Actors, Film Workers, Composers, Visual FX, Practical FX, Set/Decoration, Hair and Makeup — everyone’s welcome! 🙌🏻

DJ 's will be spinning records all night and MIR will have open the backyard for those who like to sit outside until 22.00.

DJs :
DJ  Sannergata / DJ Saraland
